content.body: Hi all, just a friendly reminder to post any discussion topics for this Thursday's joint CSSWG/WHATWG/OpenUI task force meeting to the meeting agenda issue: https://github.com/whatwg/html/issues/12380
I don't understand something I worked on. Why is cross-origin isolation mode not part of the agent cluster key?
Because it's part of the BCG which owns the cluster map?
